_comment_ipChangePolicy: IP change policy: "block" rejects, "warn" alerts, "allow" ignores
_comment_lockMode: Lock mode: "convenience" allows biometric, "strict" enforces password + idle timeout
_comment_chains: Web3 network configuration - Production environment uses official public RPC endpoints

ethereum._comment: Ethereum Mainnet - Official public RPC endpoint

base._comment: Base Mainnet - Official public RPC endpoint

relay._comment_reconnectBaseMs: Base delay in ms before first reconnect attempt
relay._comment_reconnectMaxMs: Maximum reconnect delay in ms, caps exponential backoff

signing._comment_dailyLimitUsd: Maximum total USD value of auto-approved transactions per day
signing._comment_perTxLimitUsd: Maximum USD value per single auto-approved transaction
signing._comment_autoApproveWithinBudget: When true, transactions within daily/per-tx limits may sign without a desktop prompt. When false, every chain tx requires approval.

lock._comment_strictIdleTimeoutMs: Idle timeout in ms before auto-lock in strict mode (300000 = 5min)

security._comment_maxEvents: Maximum number of security events to retain in memory
